3318380.name: Death By Chatter
3318380.description:
Death By Chatter is a 2D platformer rage game that is directly affected by your Twitch chat. Try to get to the top as your own chat sabotages you along the way!

How it works:

The game connects to your Twitch account via a Twitch application. (don't worry it can only read chat messages. as you can see below)

Then you simply type in the username of the Twitch account you want the game to read messages from. (usually your own username) And you're done!

How to play:

wait... are you telling me you've never played a 2D platformer before? UNBELIEVABLE! this game is for TRUE gamers only. (just kidding but yeah no you simply move with WASD and try to get to the top.) Be warned though, this game can be INCREDIBLY frustrating at times.

Epilepsy warning: Some scenes in the game could possibly trigger epilepsy
3318380.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
